title: Edible Sugar
description: Get your sugar rush! Sugar is now an edible snack that gives a small amount of nutrition & saturation
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# 🧁 Edible Sugar
- **Makes Sugar Edible** by turning it into a snack that gives 1 nutrition and 0.1 saturation
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
